nl_query: Which purge jobs successfully deleted notification records?
failed_sql: SELECT pjl.id, pjl.entity_type, pjl.records_purged, pjl.records_held, pjl.started_at, pjl.completed_at, pjl.status FROM purge_job_log pjl JOIN notification n ON pjl.entity_type = n.entity_type WHERE pjl.status = 'SUCCESS' AND n.entity_type = 'notification' ORDER BY pjl.started_at DESC LIMIT 100;
